function.name: AddAgenda
function.description: The API for adding a agenda item includes content, time and location.

function.name: AddAlarm
function.description: The API for setting an alarm includes a parameter for the alarm time.

function.name: AddMeeting
function.description: This API allows users to make a reservation for a meeting and store the meeting information (e.g., topic, time, location, attendees) in the database.

meeting_topic.description: The title of the meeting, no more than 50 characters.

start_time.description: The start time of the meeting, in the pattern of %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

end_time.description: The end time of the meeting, in the pattern of %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

location.description: The location where the meeting to be held, no more than 100 characters.

attendees.description: The attendees of the meeting, including names, positions and other information.

function.name: AddReminder
function.description: The API for adding a reminder item includes content and time.

function.name: AddScene
function.description: This API adds a scene of smart home system, given the scene name and a list of smart devices

devices.description: The list of smart devices, containing the name and description. Format be like [{"name": "light", "description": "Smart light in the kitchen"}, {"name": "oven", "description": "Smart oven in the kitchen"}, {"name": "range hood", "description": "Smart range hood in the kitchen"}]

function.name: AppointmentRegistration
function.description: This API registers an appointment of hospital.

date.description: The date of appointment. Format be like %Y-%m-%d

function.name: BookHotel
function.description: This API orders a hotel room. Two rooms are ordered if the number of adults is greater than 2. Only one order can be made at same time.

check_in_time.description: The time to check in. Format: %Y-%m-%d

check_out_time.description: The time to check out. Format: %Y-%m-%d

room_count.description: The number of rooms to order.

function.name: Calculator
function.description: This API provides basic arithmetic operations: addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division.

formula.description: The formula that needs to be calculated. Only integers are supported. Valid operators are +, -, *, /, and (, ). For example, '(1 + 2) * 3'.

function.name: CancelRegistration
function.description: This API cancels the registration of a patient given appointment ID.

function.name: CancelTimedSwitch
function.description: Cancels a timed switch for a smart device.

name.description: The name of the smart device.

time.description: The time to switch the device on or off. Format: %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

function.name: DeleteAccount
function.description: Delete an account.

function.name: DeleteAgenda
function.description: The API for deleting a schedule item includes parameters for token, content, time, and location.

function.name: DeleteAlarm
function.description: The API for removing an alarm includes a parameter for the time.

function.name: DeleteMeeting
function.description: This API allows users to delete a reservation for a meeting and remove the meeting information in the database.

meeting_topic.description: The title of the meeting, no more than 50 characters.

start_time.description: The start time of the meeting, in the pattern of %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

end_time.description: The end time of the meeting, in the pattern of %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

location.description: The location where the meeting to be held, no more than 100 characters.

attendees.description: The attendees of the meeting, including names, positions and other information.

function.name: DeleteReminder
function.description: The API for deleting a reminder item includes content and time.

function.name: DeleteScene
function.description: This API deletes a scene by its name.

function.name: Dictionary
function.description: This API searches the dictionary for a given keyword.

function.name: DocumentQA
function.description: This API answers the question from a given document url.

url.description: The url to download the document. It should end with .txt.

function.name: EmergencyKnowledge
function.description: This API searches for a given symptom for emergency knowledge.

function.name: ForgotPassword
function.description: Sends an email to the user with a link to reset the password. Need call twice, first with 'Forgot Password' status to get the verification code, then call again with 'Verification Code' status to change the password. Must pass the name of the parameters when calling the API, like ForgotPassword(status='Forgot Password', username='username').

status.description: 'Forgot Password' for first call, after get the verification code, call again with 'Verification Code' to change the password.

username.description: The username of the user. Only needed for the first call.

email.description: The email of the user. Only needed for the first call.

verification_code.description: The verification code sent to the user. Only needed for the second call.

new_password.description: The new password of the user. Only needed for the second call.

function.name: GetToday
function.description: This API gets the current date.

function.name: ImageCaption
function.description: This API generates a caption for a given image.

url.description: The url to download the image. It should end with .jpg, .jpeg or .png.

function.name: ModifyAgenda
function.description: The API for modifying a schedule item includes parameters for content, time, and location.

time.description: The new time for agenda. Format: %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

location.description: The new location of the agenda.

function.name: ModifyAlarm
function.description: The API for modifying an alarm includes a parameter for the from_time to to_time.

from_time.description: The time for alarm which changed from. Format: %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

to_time.description: The time for alarm which changed to. Format: %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

function.name: ModifyMeeting
function.description: This API allows users to modify a reservation for a meeting

meeting_topic.description: The title of the meeting, no more than 50 characters.

start_time.description: The start time of the meeting, in the pattern of %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

end_time.description: The end time of the meeting, in the pattern of %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

location.description: The location where the meeting to be held, no more than 100 characters.

attendees.description: The attendees of the meeting, including names, positions and other information.

function.name: ModifyPassword
function.description: The API for modifying the password of the account.

old_password.description: The old password of the user.

new_password.description: The new password of the user.

function.name: ModifyRegistration
function.description: This API modifies the registration of a patient given appointment ID.

function.name: ModifyReminder
function.description: The API for deleting a reminder item includes content and time.

function.name: ModifyScene
function.description: This API modifies a scene of smart home system, given the scene name and a list of smart devices

devices.description: The list of smart devices, containing the name and description.

function.name: OpenBankAccount
function.description: This is an API for opening a bank account for a user, given the account, password and name.

function.name: PlayMusic
function.description: This API triggers a music player to play music.

music_name.description: The name of the music to play.

function.name: QueryAgenda
function.description: The API for getting a schedule item includes parameters for token, content, time, and location.

function.name: QueryAlarm
function.description: The API for querying alarm clock, help user to check the alarm clock they have set.

function.name: QueryBalance
function.description: This API queries the balance of a given user.

function.name: QueryHealthData
function.description: This API queries the recorded health data in database of a given user and time span.

user_id.description: The user id of the given user. Cases are ignored.

start_time.description: The start time of the time span. Format: %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

end_time.description: The end time of the time span. Format: %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

function.name: QueryHistoryToday
function.description: This API queries the history of the given date.

date.description: The date of the history. Format: %m-%d

function.name: QueryMeeting
function.description: This API allows users to query the information of a meeting.

meeting_topic.description: The title of the meeting, no more than 50 characters.

start_time.description: The start time of the meeting, in the pattern of %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

end_time.description: The end time of the meeting, in the pattern of %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

location.description: The location where the meeting to be held, no more than 100 characters.

attendees.description: The attendees of the meeting, including names, positions and other information.

function.name: QueryRegistration
function.description: This API queries the registration of a patient, given patient ID.

date.description: The date of appointment. Format be like %Y-%m-%d

function.name: QueryReminder
function.description: The API for querying a reminder item includes content and time.

time.description: The time for the reminder. Format: %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

function.name: QueryScene
function.description: This API queries a scene of smart home system, given the scene name

function.name: QueryStock
function.description: This API queries the stock price of a given stock code and date.

stock_code.description: The stock code of the given stock.

date.description: The date of the stock price. Format: %Y-%m-%d

function.name: RecordHealthData
function.description: This API records the health data of a user.

time.description: The time of health data. Format: %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

health_data.description: The health data, with the format like [{'name': 'blood_pressure', 'value': '120/80'}, {'name': 'heart_rate', 'value': '80'}]

function.name: RegisterUser
function.description: The API for registering a account, given the username, password and email.

function.name: SendEmail
function.description: This API for sending email, given the receiver, subject and content.

receiver.description: The receiver address of the email.

subject.description: The subject address of the email.

function.name: SpeechRecognition
function.description: This API recognizes the speech from a given audio url.

url.description: The url to download the audio. It should end with .wav.

function.name: SymptomSearch
function.description: This API searches for a given symptom.

function.name: TimedSwitch
function.description: This API for setting a timed switch for a smart device.

name.description: The name of the smart device.

time.description: The time to switch the device on or off. Format: %Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S

on.description: Whether to switch the device on or off.

function.name: Wiki
function.description: This API for searching a keyword in Wikipedia.

function.name: GetUserToken
function.description: Get the user token by username and password.

function.name: CheckToken
function.description: Check if the token is valid.
